parameters.name: pointuint
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When sorting by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes to sort.

parameters.name: pointseed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Seed for random number generator for randomly-ordered points.

parameters.name: pointobj
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: to use when sorting points relative to Object Z-axis.

parameters.name: pointrev
parameters.label: Reverse
parameters.description: After sorting points, reverse their order.

parameters.name: pointoffset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shifts the point order by this offset.

parameters.name: primuint
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When sorting by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes to sort.

parameters.name: primobj
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: to use when sorting primitives relative to Object Z-axis.

parameters.name: primoffset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shifts the primitive order by this offset.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
